title: Kazuma
overview: A Native Alter named Kazuma uses a plane to attack kidnappers and finish a job. Now the police organizations named Hold and Holy are after him, thinking he's a dangerous criminal just because he's a Native Alter. But, Kazuma proves that he's not bad when he takes on a renegade group leader, Biff, and saves the Native Alters. Kazuma just seems to have a grudge against Holy.

title: Ryuhou
overview: The organization of Holy is explained more clearly as is how Ryuhou and Mimori first met. Both Ryuhou and Mimori gain a bigger interest in the Native Alter, Kazuma.

title: HOLY
overview: After being captured by Holy, Kazuma is imprisoned and offered two choices; join HOLY or be imprisoned. When a sympathetic Mimori sets Kazuma free, he must find a way to escape the confines of HOLY Headquarters.

title: Big Magnum
overview: After hearing about Kazuma's escape from Holy, a new client, Ayase Terada, hires Kazuma and Kimishima to rescue her sick brother and the villagers from a Hold camp.

title: Mimori Kiryu
overview: After returning from a mission, Kazuma and Kimishima find Kanami lying on the floor sick. Without the proper medical knowledge, Kazuma and Kimishima are forced to find a doctor of Holy.

title: Zetsuei
overview: With much resentment toward Hold and Holy, some Native Alters, including Kazuma and Kimishima, plan an attack on a Holy cargo van. Knowing this, Holy plats a trap.

title: Asuka Tachibana
overview: Trapped underground, Kazuma and Tachibana call a temporary truce in order to find a way out. When they do a find a way out, a giant monster appears. Kazuma instantly resorts to attacking it, which Tachibana disapproves of.

title: Mad Script
overview: After being told that he must re-enter Holy to rescue the others, Kazuma charges right though the front door. Unfortunately, a Holy member, Unkei uses his alter, the Mad Script, to control Kazuma and the events that surround him.

title: Shell Bullet
overview: Wanting to stop Holy once and for all, Kazuma ventures into the Alter forest in hopes of gaining more power.

title: Super Pinch
overview: Kazuma and Kimishima come to a town of inners that love Holy due to a man named Emergy Maxfell. Not falling for his trap, Kazuma and Kimishima beat Emergy up and force him to show his true colors. Unfortunately, Emergy's alter only appears when he's in a pinch, and due to Kazuma beating him up, that's exactly what he's in.

title: Alters
overview: After revealing that she knows the truth about the alters and Holy to Commander Sigmar, Mimori is thrown in a cell. There, she recollects the events of the past 10 episodes of the series. She also explains the events of the terrible earthquake, and the birth of the Lost Ground so many years ago.

title: Kunihiko Kimishima
overview: Hold is still deciding what to do with the town it captured from the previous episode's ending. Kimishima goes home and finds Kanami, who wasn't taken after all! He tells her to make a run for it, but before they even get out of the house, Hold intercepts them and drags them off to the camp with the rest of the towns people. In the camp Kazuma is accused of beeing responsible for the destruction. Kimishima defends his friend in front of the townspeople and flees the scene, together with Kanami.

title: Lost Ground
overview: Wanting revenge for the death of his friend, Kazuma attacks a Hold camp. Hearing the news, Ryuhou sets out to find him. The two eventually meet and fight it out. Mimori and Tachibana manage to catch up to them, as do Urizane and Sherrice.

title: Kyouji Mujyo
overview: Eight months after the fight and disappearance of Kazima and Ryuhou, Mimori, Tachibana, and Cougar search the Lost Ground, seeking answers and the whereabouts of their friends. Elsewhere, Kanami is captured and forced to work at a labor camp.

title: Rogue
overview: Not remembering anything, Kazuma is forced to fight in an Alter fighting arena. Mimori and Tachibana show up and try to get Kazuma to remember, but to no avail. Will Kazuma ever remember? And if he does what part of his past will allow him to? Elsewhere, Kanami and Ryuhou get closer.

title: Sou Kigetsuki
overview: Sou Kigetsuki and Unkei, along with the Tokonatsu Three Sisters, devise a plain against Ryuhou. They want to see how powerful he's gotten since he saw the "other side".

title: Ayase Terada
overview: Ayase and Kazuma are forced to fight one another. Ayase explains that after being captured by Holy they experimented on her and made her alter more powerful. Now, if she wants her dying brother to get better, she has to kill Kazuma.

title: Straight Cougar
overview: Wanting to find Kazuma, Kanami sets off. Ryuhou goes with her to protect her, while Sherrice stays behind and looks over the village. Meanwhile, Cougar informs Mimori and Tachibana that he knows where Ryuhou is. The two set off to find him, but instead come across Biff.

title: The Three Tokonatsu Sisters
overview: Sherrice gets attacked by the darths led by Kigetsuki and his alter, Tokonatsu Three Sisters. Just when it looks grim for Sherrice, Ryuhou and the others show up. But, can Ryuhou fight back knowing that the villagers' lives are in danger? And will Kigetsuki get Ryuhou to open up an alter gate? Meanwhile, Cougar and Kazuma are heading to the scene.

title: Kanami Yuta
overview: After being reunited after so long, Kazuma and Kanami reminisce about the past. Elsewhere, Ryuhou, Tachibana, Sherrice, Mimori, and Cougar all discuss their next plan of action.

title: HOLY Eye
overview: After Kyouji Mujyo takes Kanami hostage, both Kazuma and Ryuhou decide to head out alone and rescue her. Cougar stops them, telling them that they must work together and go with everyone else as a group. Meanwhile, Mujyo is still bent on getting Kazuma and Ryuhou to open up the other dimension.

title: Martin Jigmar
overview: Kazuma and Ryuhou break into Kyouji Mujyo's fortress. They split up for the time being and each meet up with a former ally.

title: Scheris Adjani
overview: Mimori and Cougar come across Kyouji Mujyo. Cougar tells Mimori to go on ahead and find the main power generator so that she can weaken Mujyo. But, can Cougar win against the newly powerful Mujyo? Elsewhere, Kazuma is having some problems of his own when his right hand looses all feeling. Can he continue fighting? Meanwhile, Ryuhou finally comes across the Crystallized Form.

title: Fist
overview: Kazuma and Ryuhou finally come across Kyouji Mujyo. Kazuma takes him on while Ryuhou fights the Crystallized Form.

title: Native
overview: After Mujyo's defeat, the Mainland steps in to clean everything up. But, this is bad news for Kazuma and Ryuhou, as the Mainland isn't done with them yet. Kazuma and Ryuhou says their goodbyes to their loved ones and set out to fight the Mainland.

title: Dream
overview: With the Lost Ground and Inners rebuilding, Kazuma and Ryuhou can finally fight, free of distractions.
